codeReview.summary: The fix commit fully addresses the prior blocking issue: it stages and commits the deletion of src/pages/projects.astro as its only code change, matching the feature requirements. Handoff/transcript evidence also shows npm run build exited 0 after the commit.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The content-worker procedure is broader than this fix type: the transcript skeleton shows a git-only deletion/build workflow, but handoff marks followedProcedure=true even though SKILL.md mandates brand/thesis/vault reading and manual page verification steps that are not represented for this maintenance-style task.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for session 26273d8a-b8b4-4598-83b7-ad378efb71be shows git add/commit, git log, npm run build, and ls checks; .factory/skills/content-worker/SKILL.md steps 1-3 and 8 require brand/thesis/vault reading and manual verification.

summary: Pass. Compared against the failed feature commit (80bc73a, which omitted file deletion), this fix commit (84b1781) cleanly records the src/pages/projects.astro deletion and includes successful build verification evidence, resolving the original blocking failure.
